problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
